name: Crisp Baked New Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces cooked whole new potatoes, chilled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Cut each potato into 4 wedges and transfer to a small bowl. Set aside.
3. In a small saucepan or metal measuring container, melt margarine; add soy sauce and stir to combine.
4. Pour the margarine mixture over potatoes and toss to coat.
5. Transfer potatoes to a nonstick baking sheet brushed with any remaining margarine mixture.
6. Sprinkle with seasonings.
7. Bake for 1 hour or until crisp.
